case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MANDY ELIZABETH SMITH

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CENDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MANDY ELIZABETH SMITH IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $511.35 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, MANDY ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
